results.title: Mighty Networks Projects $500M Host Earnings, Boosts Product Velocity | Mighty Networks | Create With
results.text:
Mighty Networks Projects $500M Host Earnings, Boosts Product Velocity | Mighty Networks | Create With

Mighty Networks reports $500M in host earnings for 2025, 84% average member-led engagement, weekly app releases and 31 new features per quarter. Hundreds of open APIs launched in November. Product engineering productivity tripled year-over-year (Jan 26 vs Jan 25). New Hosts on the Launch Plan earn $4,800/year (6x ROI, ~3-month payback).
highlights: Mighty Networks Projects $500M Host Earnings, Boosts Product Velocity | Mighty Networks | Create With Mighty Networks reports $500M in host earnings for 2025, 84% average member-led engagement, weekly app releases and 31 new features per quarter. # Mighty Networks vs. Membership.io: Which Is Best For Your Membership?

Membership.io Team

Jan 21, 2026

## Quick Comparison Summary: Membership.io vs. Mighty Networks

Feature

Mighty Networks

*All features, functionality and prices shown are annual billing rates as of November 2025. Monthly billing is available at higher rates. Prices subject to change.

## The Membership Platform Dilemma

Your members join, pumped up and ready to transform. They bought into your promise to help them get from point A to point B. But then reality hits… hard. They get lost in your ocean of content, overwhelmed by choices, unsure where to start.

Sound familiar?

If you're reading this, you're likely weighing Mighty Networks against Membership.io, hoping one will finally give your content and community a forever home.

Here's what you need to know: these platforms excel at solving different problems.

Mighty Networks' Strength: Building vibrant social communities where peer-to-peer connection and networking drive engagement.

Membership.io's Strength: Delivering structured, transformation-focused content with integrated community features where measurable outcomes drive retention.

Think of it this way: Mighty Networks creates a dynamic virtual conference-like environment. It’s great for networking and collaborative learning. Membership.io, on the other hand, builds a focused training center. It’s optimized for content delivery, community, and transformation tracking.

results.title: Mighty Networks - AI Tool Review, Pricing & Features (2026) | Tool Academy AI
results.author: Tool Academy AI
results.text:
Mighty Networks - AI Tool Review, Pricing & Features (2026) | Tool Academy AI

Back to Tools

# Mighty Networks

Community platform for courses, memberships, and events with native mobile apps

Creator Economy

Education & Learning

Team Communication

LikeSave

Starting from

$79/mo

14-day free trial

Try Mighty Networks View full pricing

Is this your tool? Claim it

SummaryFeaturesPros & ConsPricingCostsCompareBest ForNot ForPositionLearningFAQAlternatives

## AI-Powered Summary

Mighty Networks is a community platform that combines discussion forums, online courses, events, and membership payments into a single branded experience with native mobile apps. It targets creators, coaches, educators, and brands who want to build paid communities with high member engagement. The platform's Community Design™ methodology and AI Cohost feature help hosts structure their communities for retention and revenue.

## Key Features

What makes Mighty Networks stand out

Native Mobile Apps

Real iOS and Android apps that appear on members' home screens, not just mobile web pages.

Online Courses

Create on-demand, cohort-based, or live courses with quizzes, certifications, and drip content.

Community Spaces

Activity feeds, chat threads, private groups, polls, and questions to foster member discussions.

AI Cohost

An AI assistant tuned to your community that helps with content creation and engagement strategies.

Events & Livestreaming

Host online and in-person events with built-in livestreaming or Zoom integration.

Membership Payments

Charge subscriptions, one-time payments, create tiers, offer free trials, and promo codes.

Community Design™

A strategy framework backed by data from 9 billion monthly data points to structure your community.

Member Engagement Tools

Streaks, points, leaderboards, badges, and referral programs to keep members active and returning.

## What's Great

- Built-in revenue tools with hosts reportedly earning $500M in 2025
- Community Design™ framework provides a structured methodology for building engaged communities
- All-in-one platform combining community, courses, events, and payments eliminates tool-stacking
- 84% member-led activity means less content creation burden on hosts
- Native iOS and Android apps that drive 60% more activity than web-only platforms

## Things to Know

- Platform lock-in risk — moving a community and its content elsewhere can be difficult
- Key integrations like Zapier, Kit, and Google Analytics are locked behind the $179/month Scale plan
- Custom branded apps require the Mighty Pro plan which requires contacting sales (likely very expensive)
- Starting at $79/month is expensive compared to free or low-cost alternatives like Discord or Facebook Groups

## Pricing Plans

All Mighty Networks pricing tiers and features

MonthlyYearly

Save

Annual billing available with

Pricing

Branded Apps

Mighty Pro

Start Your Free Trial Log In

Community Design is Our AI

# AI Cohost

Personalized strategy and setup for every stage. Not generic AI — a point of view that's driven $500M in results.

Try Mighty For Free

Not Generic AI

## AI built to grow community businesses

Most platforms bolt on AI to check a box. We trained AI Cohost on Community Design™ — the strategy behind $500M in community earnings. Trained on 8 years of what works (and what doesn't), AI Cohost doesn't just answer your questions.It'll gently tell you when you're underpricing. It'll highlight when your offer is too complicated. It'll share the exact growth funnels working right now — and how all of this applies to your unique idea.

##### A midlife professionals community hit 73.7% contribution growth in 30 days with offers starting at just $25/month on Mighty.

##### A young women's faith community hit 100% active member rate and $48.9K ARR by turning inspiration into daily transformation on Mighty.

##### A deaf news community launched in March and hit 2,567 members with $34K ARR in under a month on Mighty.

Your Stage. Your Strategy.

## AI Cohost Adapts

What you need at $500/month isn't what you need at $50,000. AI Cohost is tuned to your plan.

###### Launch

Get your first 10 members in 30 days. AI Cohost is there to support you as you build an offer, mine your contacts, and reach out with something worth paying for.

Learn more

###### Scale

Automate what's working or migrate without losing momentum. AI Cohost walks you through integrations, automations, and migration playbooks.

Learn more

###### Grow

Double your revenue with the right funnels. AI Cohost helps you run challenges, summits, flash sales, and referral programs — while avoiding complexity and mistakes.

Learn more

###### Guarantee Results

When you want more than an AI Cohost. Dedicated strategists who've driven $500M in results, plus branded apps that drive 59% weekly active members — skip to the best results.

Learn more

##### A motorcycle community earned $258K ARR after retooling their navigation, improving onboarding, and boosting weekly posts — driving 10K new contributions in a single month on Mighty.

AI Cohost is Trained on Community Design

## Strategy Meets Setup

AI Cohost does two things: helps you personalize
